title: Enphase Energy (ENPH) Q3 2024 Earnings Highlights: Strong Revenue and Strategic Expansion
text: Enphase Energy delivered strong Q3 2024 results with revenue of $380.9 million and a gross margin of 48.1% on a non-GAAP basis. The company generated strong free cash flow of $161.6 million. Operationally, Enphase shipped approximately 1.7 million microinverter units and 172.9 megawatt hours of batteries. The company introduced higher domestic content microinverter SKUs qualifying for a 10% ITC adder and plans to launch a fourth-generation battery in early 2025, which should reduce installation costs by roughly $300 per kilowatt hour. Management highlighted plans for European expansion, including new IQ8 series microinverters and IQ EV chargers targeting a $1.4 billion market opportunity. For Q4 2024, the company expects revenue of $360-400 million with gross margins of 47-50% GAAP. European sales declined 15% from Q2, while a major US customer bankruptcy created a $10-15 million revenue headwind that management expects to recover through distribution channels.
